channel.title: Posts on lordematus
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on lordematus

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first blog post. I decided to create this blog to document my journey as a developer and share what I’m learning along the way.

The blog itself was built with Hugo, a fast static site generator. I started with the simplest possible setup: pure HTML templates with no custom CSS or JavaScript. The idea is to add features incrementally as I go.

Stay tuned for more posts.
